symptom: Global installation fails with EEXIST file already exists
log_excerpt:
npm ERR! code EEXIST
npm ERR! syscall rename
npm ERR! path C:\Users\dev\AppData\Roaming\npm\clawhub
npm ERR! dest C:\Users\dev\AppData\Roaming\npm\clawhub.old
npm ERR! errno -4075
npm ERR! EEXIST: file already exists, rename 'C:\Users\dev\AppData\Roaming\npm\clawhub' -> 'C:\Users\dev\AppData\Roaming\npm\clawhub.old'
notes: Previous global install left files; Windows path collision likely. Impacts new installs/updates.

symptom: Package installation fails with 404 Not Found
log_excerpt:
npm ERR! code E404
npm ERR! 404 Not Found - GET https://registry.npmjs.org/tavily-search - Not found
npm ERR! 404  'tavily-search' is not in the npm registry.
notes: Likely wrong or unknown package name. Candidate skill may exist on ClawHub under a different name.

symptom: Tool fails due to missing environment variable
log_excerpt:
Error: TAVILY_API_KEY is not set
Check README_CONFIG.md for required environment variables.
Process exited with code 1.
notes: Environment variable not configured for Tavily API. Affects all web_search calls.

symptom: Browser integration reports 'tab not found' during follow-up operations
log_excerpt:
[extension] error: tab not found
Gateway: connected=true; badge: OFF
Action aborted: target tab is detached or closed.
notes: Follow-up operation attempted after tab was closed or extension detached. Gateway reseat may be required.
